title: Supreme Court Docket US-SCOTUS-1075
summary: 1 This case involves the construction and constitutional validity of the Act of September 7, 1949, 63 Stat. §§ 4244—4248, 'To provide for the care and custody of insane persons charged with or convicted of offenses against the United States, and for other purposes.' 2 Section 4244 provides a proc...
